name: VisionAgent
description: Vision processing agent that analyzes images using multimodal AI to identify product defects, assembly issues, and visual troubleshooting scenarios.

skills.name: Product Image Analysis
skills.description: Analyze product images to identify defects, damage, assembly issues, and visual troubleshooting scenarios for customer service.
examples: Identify visible damage in product photos
Analyze assembly progress and identify missing steps
Detect error indicators on device displays
Assess product condition for warranty claims

skills.name: Visual Question Answering
skills.description: Answer specific questions about image content, focusing on customer service scenarios like warranty assessment and troubleshooting.
examples: Is this product damaged or defective?
What error code is shown on the display?
What is the condition of this product?
